title: MasterClass LMS Portal
description: An interactive web app offering browser-based containers, server command execution, and live compiler feedback for teaching systems design. Built for scale with 150k active students.

title: Github Action: Auto-Linter
description: A customized GitHub action that auto-analyzes React performance hooks and memory usage patterns, with over 45,000 active workspace installations.

title: Horizon placements Portal
description: A tailored web system built by Faisal's mentored student cohort. Connects course graduates with top tech companies, resulting in over 15,000 successful engineering hires.

title: SpaceX Trajectory Simulation
description: An interactive WebGL dashboard mapping Mars rocket trajectory profiles, built by a team of university students using Faisal's systems architecture curriculum guide.
